messages.content: Preetam BalkrishnaJoshi is an Indian journalist and television personality. He is currently working as a newsreader and journalist for news channel ABC News. He has worked for various news channels in the past and has been a part of various news events and debates. He is known for his quick thinking and analysis during the debates and his ability to connect with the audience.
Who is Mustaque Ahamad? The one from Georgia Tech

Mustaque Ahamad is a student at Georgia Tech and an internet marketing student majoring in the School of Information and Communication Technology. He is also a member of the marketing and advertising class at the school. Mustaque Ahamad is a student who is passionate about marketing and advertising, and he is currently working on his internship at a marketing company. He is also involved in various student organizations and has served as a part of the school\'s student body.
